name: Shelf Floor Lamp White (Light Bulbs Not Included) - Room Essentials™
description:
Keep your indoor lighting functional and stylish with this Shelf Floor Lamp from Room Essentials™. This tall floor lamp makes a welcome addition to your living room, lobby or anywhere else in your home. It features a metal base that's designed with built-in shelves for storage and display of items, and it has a cylindrical shade in a fresh white finish.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
